mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_detail (order_id, drug_id, specification_id, drug_name, specification_name,price, quantity, subtotal, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.drugId}, #{item.specificationId}, #{item.drugName}, #{item.specificationName}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT drug_id, drug_name, specification_id, specification_name, price, quantity, subtotal FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
